explanation: This command creates a scheduled task with a GUID-like name, which matches the Sigma rule. It serves as a true-positive test case.
This command uses single quotes around the GUID-like task name, which is a valid mutation technique and still matches the Sigma rule.
This command omits the quotes around the GUID-like task name, which is a valid mutation technique and still matches the Sigma rule.
This command adds an extra space after the closing quote, which is a valid insertion mutation technique and still matches the Sigma rule.
This command reorders the arguments, which is a valid mutation technique and still matches the Sigma rule.
